title: Trichotolinum deserticola
taxonomy: Trichotolinum deserticola is classified as a species of fungus, specifically belonging to the family Trichocomaceae. It is a type of soil fungus that grows in arid and semi-arid regions. Further classification places Trichotolinum deserticola within the genus Trichotolinum, which is a group of fungi known for their unique characteristics.
